result.stdout:
PKV's global command line tool.

Usage: j2cs [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  Name                A positional parameter that must be specified.
                      The name of the person to greet.

Options:
  -c|--count <COUNT>  An optional parameter, with a default value.
                      The number of times to say hello.
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information
